evals.prompt: I am starting a new TypeScript SaaS repo for long-term AI coding. Design the docs/* top-level folders and explain where roadmap, ADRs, proposals, implementation specs, API docs, and evidence should live.
evals.expected_output: Defines project-agnostic docs layers, keeps implementation specs outside docs/*, and gives clear owns/must-not-own boundaries.

evals.prompt: This repo has docs/next, docs/review-plan, docs/superpowers/results, docs/specs, and specs/. Decide what should be migrated, deleted, or kept so agents stop using old planning paths.
evals.expected_output: Audits old folders by semantic lifecycle, preserves evidence when needed, and avoids keeping duplicate current homes.

evals.prompt: We have a wire protocol with JSON Schema and canonical examples. Should it live under docs/specs, docs/protocols, standards, or root specs?
evals.expected_output: Routes wire contracts to docs/protocols, executable implementation specs to root specs, and standards to command/rule discipline.
